---
name: New Region Request
about: Request support for a new country or region
title: "[REGION] Add support for [Country/Region Name]"
labels: new-region
assignees: ''
---

## Region Details

- **Country / Region:** [e.g., Singapore]
- **Sub-regions / States:** [e.g., all — Singapore is a city-state]
- **Utility / AHJ:** [e.g., SP Group, BCA (Building and Construction Authority)]

## Standards to Implement

List the primary standards for each MEP discipline. Include the **full standard number, title, and edition year**.

| Discipline | Standard Number | Title | Edition |
|-----------|----------------|-------|---------|
| Electrical | SS 638 | Code of Practice for Electrical Installations | 2018 |
| HVAC | SS 553 | Code of Practice for Air Conditioning and Mechanical Ventilation | 2016 |
| Plumbing | SS 636 | Code of Practice for Water Services | 2018 |
| Fire | SS 645 | Code of Practice for Fire Precautions in Buildings | 2021 |

## Ambient/Design Conditions

| Parameter | Value | Source |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| Summer design DB (°C) | 35 | SS 553 Table 1 |
| Summer design WB (°C) | 28 | SS 553 Table 1 |
| Winter design DB (°C) | 24 | N/A — tropical |
| Ambient for cable sizing (°C) | 35 | SS 638 Table |

## Cable Sizing Standard

- Standard name and edition for LV cable sizing:
- Basis ambient temperature (°C):
- Voltage drop limit (%):
- Cable type designations used:

## Currency

- Local currency: [e.g., SGD]
- BOQ measurement standard: [e.g., SISV — Singapore Institute of Surveyors and Valuers]

## Are You Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this region (I will follow ADDING_NEW_REGION.md)
- [ ] I can provide standard documents and reference values for a developer
- [ ] I'm requesting this feature — I cannot contribute code

## Supporting Documents

Can you provide (or link to publicly available) standards or official technical documents? Please note that many standards are copyrighted and cannot be attached directly — link to the purchasing page instead.

## Additional Context

Any other information about the region's MEP regulatory environment, local variations, or authority-specific requirements.
